name: brca_pathway_mlp_kegg_filtered
notes: Ablation 1/4: pathway_only=True eliminates the UNASSIGNED catch-all node by filtering input genes to only those that map to at least one C2 KEGG pathway. top_k raised to 5000 so ~2750 pathway-assigned genes survive the variance pre-selection (~55% of C2 KEGG's 7012 unique genes). Every gene feeding the MaskedLinear is a real pathway member, giving each pathway node a clean, biologically-grounded signal. Baseline for comparison: brca_pathway_mlp_kegg (CI=0.564, top_k=3000, no filtering).
